name: Panax Ginseng Root
description: The premier adaptogen in Eastern medicine. Ginseng roots are rich in ginsenosides (saponins) that improve cardiorespiratory capacity, combat systemic cell fatigue, and modulate cortisol pathways under clinical stress.
preparation: Ginseng tea: Steep 3g of thinly sliced dry root in 200ml of boiling water for 15 minutes. Drink warm once daily.
safetyAlert: Generally extremely safe. Avoid high dosages in patients with severe uncontrolled hypertension or acute cardiac dysrhythmias.
interactions: Avoid concurrent use with MAOIs. May enhance hypoglycemic effects of antidiabetic drugs.
